product.name: ArWoWear T4 EMK
product.categorySourceGroup: Fabrics for Emi shielding, anti-radar, antistress, high voltage protection.
product.specLine: 200 g/m², 55% Polyester 25% Cotton 20% Stainless Steel, EMI shielding, Conductive 2/1 S Twill Fabric
descriptions: 55% polyester 25% Cotton 20% Stainless Steel emi shielding twill fabric.
Arwowear T4 EMK fabrics can be used as emi shileding for walls and baby cloth by reducing all kind of electromagnetic waves.
Another application is conductive clothing for live line workers, anti-radar applications for military cages, anti-stress and pain reducer bandages.
Arox T4 Antibac is certfied as IEC 60895 for line workers clothing.
200 g/m², 55% Polyester 25% Cotton 20% Stainless Steel, EMI shielding, Conductive 2/1 S Twill Fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 55% Polyester (PES) 25% Cotton (CO) 20% Stainless Steel (MTF) | EN ISO 2076
Tensile Strength | Warp > 900N ; Weft > 700N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 25N ; Weft > 20N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 2-3 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
